name: Emma Walsh
title: Product Manager
summary: PM with an engineering background who bridges technical and business teams. Launched 4 B2B SaaS products. Comfortable diving into data, writing tight specs, and pushing back on scope creep.

highlights: Owned the core workflow product used by 300+ enterprise customers
Led discovery and launch of an AI-assisted reporting feature, driving 25% upsell
Ran weekly sprint ceremonies and maintained a 6-month roadmap aligned with sales commitments
Launched 2 new product lines from discovery to GA in under 5 months each
Introduced a user interview program — conducted 80+ sessions in the first year
Worked on enterprise Java backend systems before transitioning to product
Engineering background produces unusually tight and unambiguous product specs
